svg.font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Segoe UI, sans-serif
svg.title: Sovereign Conclave Advanced Blueprint
svg.desc: A highly detailed, futuristic HUD visualization of the Sovereign Conclave deliberation protocol.

g.title: Georgy Zhukov - decisive force and operational reach
John J. Pershing - logistics, training, unity of command
Vo Nguyen Giap - asymmetric protraction and political clock
Yi Sun-sin - prepared defense and favorable terrain
George Washington - strategic endurance and legitimacy
Toussaint Louverture - liberation and sovereignty from below
Mau Mau - land, dignity, and resistance pressure
Lee Kuan Yew - scale, discipline, and pragmatic governance
Suleiman the Magnificent - codified law and administration
David Addington - legal process and accountability channels
Sejong the Great - accessible systems and capability of the governed
Nelson Mandela - reconciliation, legitimacy, durable peace
Dick Cheney - concentrated command authority under worst-case threat
Richard Feynman - first principles and unexplained complexity check
Baroness Brenda Hale - proportionality and rights check
John von Neumann - formal modeling and game theory
J. Robert Oppenheimer - capability, consequence, dual-use control

svg.text: SYS.OP: CONCLAVE // STATUS: VERIFIED // DIRECTIVES: ENFORCED
